title: Panoší Újezd Summer House / Lenka Milerová architektka
summary: Mrs. F. owned a large house in the village of Panoší Újezd. It had become too big for her, so she decided to keep only the old pigsty and a small patch of garden from the entire property, which she wanted to convert into a summer home. The building was in a disastrous state.

fullArticle:
Mrs. F. owned a large house in the village of Panoší Újezd. It had become too big for her, so she decided to keep only the old pigsty and a small patch of garden from the entire property, which she wanted to convert into a summer home. The building was in a disastrous state.
